folio.label: 83r
folio.l: But as my brother , telle me how do ©e
Now be my trouthe , dere brother seyde he
As I shal tellen the , a feitúful tale
My wages ben ful streyte , and eke ful smale
My lord is hard to me , and daungerous
And myn office , is ful laboriuslaboriouslaborious
And therfore , by extorciou~s I lyue
For sothe I take , al that men wol me ©eue
Algate by sleigúte , or by violence
Fro ©ere to ©ere , I wynne al my dispence
I can no betir tellen , feitúfully
¢ Now certis q¶ this Sompnour , so fare I
I spare nat to take , god it wot
But if it be to heuy , or to hot
What I may gete , in counseil preuyly
No manere conscience , of that haue I
Ner myn exterciou~ , I mygút nat lyuen
Ne of swicú Iapes , wol I nat be shreuenö
Stomak ne conscience , knowe I noon
I shrewe theise shriftefaderes , euäychou~
Wel be we mette , by god & by Seynt Iame
But leue brother , telle me thy name
Quod this Sompnour , rigút in this mene while
This ©eman gan , a litel for to smyle
Brother q¶ he , wylt æè that I the telle
I am a fende , my dwellyngö is in helle
And here I ryde , a boute my purchasyngö
To wete , where men wold me ©eue , ony thyngö
My purchas is the effect , of al my rent
Loke how thow ridest , for the same entent
To wynne good , thow rekkest neuäe how
Rygút so fare I , for ride wold I now
Vn to the worlddes ende , for a preye
¢ A q¶ this Sompnoå , bn~dicite what ©e seye
I wende ©e were , a ©eman trewely
ñe han a mannes shap~ , as wel as I
Han ©e thanne a figure , detäminate
In helle there ©e ben , in ©oure estate
Nay certeynly q¶ he , there han we noone
But whan vs liketú , we can take vs one
Or ellis make ©ow seme , we ben shape
Somtyme lyke a man , or lyke an Ape
Or lyke an Aungel , can I ride or go
It is no wonder thyngö , thougú it be so
A lousy Iogelour , can disceyue the
And parde ©et can I , moore craft than he
